description: Rice responds well to steady moisture and cooler field temperatures.
recommendation: Irrigate when moisture falls below the crop threshold and the trend is declining.

description: Tomato plants are sensitive to dry spells during flowering.
recommendation: Prioritize irrigation when soil moisture drops quickly and humidity is low.

description: Chili plants prefer moderate moisture with good drainage.
recommendation: Use shorter irrigation cycles when rainfall has already contributed water.

description: Leafy greens need frequent but light watering.
recommendation: Check the 24h average moisture before turning the pump on.

description: Maize can tolerate brief dry periods but not sustained stress.
recommendation: Activate irrigation when the threshold gap becomes strongly negative.
